steps: Go to https://coinmarketcap.com/api/ and click 'GET YOUR API KEY NOW'
Sign in with an existing CoinMarketCap account or register a new one
Once logged in, your API key is shown in the top-left panel of your Developer Portal dashboard at https://pro.coinmarketcap.com/account
Hover over the masked key to reveal it, then click the blue 'Copy Key' button
Use the key in the X-CMC_PRO_API_KEY request header for all API calls

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: CoinMarketCap API key sent in the X-CMC_PRO_API_KEY request header

notes: Free Basic plan includes 10,000 monthly API call credits
The API key is provisioned automatically after account creation — no manual request needed
Usage statistics and audit logs are available in the Developer Portal dashboard
Paid plans (Hobbyist, Startup, Standard, Professional, Enterprise) offer higher call limits and additional endpoints

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve API key usage statistics to verify the key is active
